mapper.select: select draft_id, user_id, thread_id, status, title, brief, objective, scope, output_format, constraints_json, questions_json, revision, plan_summary, plan_steps_json, ready, last_user_message_id, last_assistant_message_id, created_at, updated_at from research_drafts where user_id = #{userId} and thread_id = #{threadId} and status <> 'DISCARDED' order by updated_at desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into research_drafts (draft_id, user_id, thread_id, status, title, brief, objective, scope, output_format, constraints_json, questions_json, revision, plan_summary, plan_steps_json, ready, last_user_message_id, last_assistant_message_id, created_at, updated_at) values (#{draft.draftId}, #{draft.userId}, #{draft.threadId}, #{draft.status}, #{draft.title}, #{draft.brief}, #{draft.objective}, #{draft.scope}, #{draft.outputFormat}, #{draft.constraintsJson}::jsonb, #{draft.questionsJson}::jsonb, #{draft.revision}, #{draft.planSummary}, #{draft.planStepsJson}::jsonb, #{draft.ready}, #{draft.lastUserMessageId}, #{draft.lastAssistantMessageId}, #{draft.createdAt}, #{draft.updatedAt}) on conflict (draft_id) do update set status = excluded.status, title = excluded.title, brief = excluded.brief, objective = excluded.objective, scope = excluded.scope, output_format = excluded.output_format, constraints_json = excluded.constraints_json, questions_json = excluded.questions_json, revision = excluded.revision, plan_summary = excluded.plan_summary, plan_steps_json = excluded.plan_steps_json, ready = excluded.ready, last_user_message_id = excluded.last_user_message_id, last_assistant_message_id = excluded.last_assistant_message_id, updated_at = excluded.updated_at
mapper.update: update research_drafts set status = 'DISCARDED', updated_at = now() where user_id = #{userId} and thread_id = #{threadId} and status <> 'DISCARDED'
